story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1101_0100_20:
The second Arceus Cup Gym Leader
Tournament has reached the finals!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1101_0200_20:
It’s down to Korrina and Sabrina, and neither
is backing down!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_0300_10:
We won against the Fighting Dojo to claim
the Saffron City Gym...
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_0400_10:
And now, I foresee our victory again.
It’s crystal clear!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_0500_10:
I knew battling a Psychic-type user would
be tough!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_0700_10:
winning this battle—together with Lucario—
means so much to me!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_0900_10: I’m sorry, but we’ll be winning this.
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_1000_10: (It’s no use. We can’t get close!)
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_1200_10: Time to Mega Evolve and close the gap!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_1500_10: (The future I saw... Did it change?)
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_1600_10: Alakazam! It’s time we Mega Evolved too!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1101_1700_20:
Both competitors have Mega Evolved!
The battle is heating up!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_1900_10:
(But if one has more experience
Mega Evolving...)
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_2100_10: We did it, Lucario! Our comeback victory!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_2200_10:
Maybe it isn’t possible to fully predict what
the future holds...
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_2300_10:
You’re stronger than I expected.
I admit defeat.
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_2600_10:
Thanks to you too. You helped me realize
something important.
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_2700_10:
I was so sure I’d win, since I had the
advantage. Perhaps that’s why I lost.
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_3400_10:
I was so focused on the battle, I forgot that’s
why we were battling in the first place!
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_3600_10:
Does this mean our bond with our Pokémon
hasn’t reached its potential?
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_3700_10:
The battle may be over, but it’s a bit
anticlimactic.
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_3800_10:
I know we just battled, but how about a
rematch soon?
story_arceus_09_01000/2401_1001_4000_10: Let’s train up and give it another shot!
